title: Onix [16x]
description: A unique package with unusual designs
body:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca60f309bdb28f92cb4b937e8975fcc7b6ee3321_0.webp)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Onix 16x was a project that took almost a year to develop. It's a pleasure to finally bring it to the public, a public that likes to try my designs and new things. The Onix is a pack full of different things that you never find in another pack.
